title: Files from link not searchable
excerpt: If I add a file from link it will not appear in the “Search Everything” place. It will appear in the “Cross bar” view, but not in the File view, which I think could be confusing for my team members as we add files from l…

posts.author: Domyx (Kris)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I add a file from link it will not appear in the “Search Everything” place. It will appear in the “Cross bar” view, but not in the File view, which I think could be confusing for my team members as we add files from links quite often.

Suggestion to add Files from links in Search everything File section.
